title: canthiumera neilgherrensis
intro: Canthiumera neilgherrensis, also known as the 'Neilgherries', is a flowering plant species native to India and Sri Lanka. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive disorders. Canthiumera neilgherrensis is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
